case_title: JOHN LYONS VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LYONS, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-26-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-25-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-03-2014

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-20-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-09-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LYONS, JOHN
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-26-2014 CONTINUED TO APR-09-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-20-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
